content:
Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges:
[(4, 7, 1), (2, 5, 2), (3, 9, 2), (1, 3, 3), (4, 9, 5), (4, 6, 10), (7, 8, 12), (6, 7, 13), (3, 7, 15), (6, 9, 15), (2, 6, 16), (2, 3, 18)],

We need to find the nodes linked with node 4 exactly at time 5.

First, we will scan each edge (u, v, t) and collect the other node whenever the time t matches the queried time AND one of the nodes matches the queried node.

For time 5:

* Edge (4, 7, 1) has node 4 and time 5. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (2, 5, 2) has node 2 and time 2. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (3, 9, 2) has node 3 and time 2. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (1, 3, 3) has node 1 and time 3. -> Add node 3.
* Edge (4, 9, 5) has node 4 and time 5. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (4, 6, 10) has node 4 and time 10. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (7, 8, 12) has node 7 and time 12. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (6, 7, 13) has node 6 and time 13. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (3, 7, 15) has node 3 and time 15. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (6, 9, 15) has node 6 and time 15. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (2, 6, 16) has node 2 and time 16. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (2, 3, 18) has node 2 and time 18. -> Add node 3.

Now we have the following nodes matched at time 5: 7, 8, 9, 6.

Answer: [7, 8, 9, 6]
